nodes.name: Webhook Trigger

nodes.name: Extract Request
nodes.notes: Parse magic content request from webhook

parameters.query: SELECT opt_in_magic FROM profiles WHERE id = '{{ $node["extract-request"].json.userId }}'

nodes.name: Check Opt-In Status
nodes.notes: Verify user opted in to magic content

nodes.name: Validate Opt-In
nodes.notes: Validate user consent for magic content

nodes.name: Generate Magic Content
nodes.notes: Call content generation API (songs, videos, playlists)

nodes.notes: Format content URLs for WhatsApp message
